message:
feat: add file transfer (upload/download) support

- Add Upload menu item (Cmd+U) with file picker
- Add Download menu item (Cmd+Shift+S) with path dialog
- Add drag & drop file upload to terminal panel
- Server handles file_upload and file_download messages
- Upload writes to panel's current working directory
- Download supports ~, relative and absolute paths
- 100MB file size limit for downloads
